async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    """Startup + shutdown lifecycle."""

    logger.info("Claire starting (recovery mode)")
    yield
    logger.info("Claire shutting down")

def create_app() -> FastAPI:
    """Create a minimal FastAPI app with one safe route attached."""

    app = FastAPI(
        title="Claire (Recovery Mode)",
        version="0.1",
        lifespan=lifespan,
    )

    # CORS (wide open for now)
    app.add_middleware(
        CORSMiddleware,
        allow_origins=["*"],
        allow_credentials=True,
        allow_methods=["*"],
        allow_headers=["*"],
    )

    # ? Health routes
    @app.get("/")
    async def root():
        return {"status": "ok", "mode": "recovery"}

    @app.get("/health")
    async def health():
        return {"status": "healthy"}

    # ? Attach first working router
    app.include_router(pipeline_router)
    app.include_router(dashboard_alignment_router)

    app.include_router(enterprise_runs_router)
    app.include_router(continuous_runtime_router)
    app.include_router(enterprise_cockpit_payload_router)
    app.include_router(source_universes_router)
    # v19.82B.16 authored cockpit compatibility routes
    app.include_router(authored_cockpit_compat_routes.router)
    # v19.82B.16.1 dashboard payload binding routes
    app.include_router(authored_cockpit_payload_binding_routes.router)
    # v19.83.2 active route truth verification
    app.include_router(active_route_truth_routes.router)
    app.include_router(cockpit_operational_status_router)

    app.include_router(live_intelligence_status_router)

    app.include_router(operational_proof_router)

    app.include_router(cockpit_operational_proof_router)


    # CLAIRE_V19_88_7_COCKPIT_RUNTIME_SYNC_MOUNT
    try:
        from .routes.cockpit_runtime_sync import router as cockpit_runtime_sync_router
        app.include_router(cockpit_runtime_sync_router)
    except Exception as cockpit_runtime_sync_error:  # pragma: no cover
        try:
            app.state.cockpit_runtime_sync_mount_error = str(cockpit_runtime_sync_error)
        except Exception:
            pass

    app.include_router(operator_runtime_execution_router)
    app.include_router(runtime_state_emitter_router)
    install_cockpit_beacon_injector(app)
    return app

functions.source_preview:
async def claire_a10_root_route_owner_beacon_middleware(request, call_next):
    response = await call_next(request)
    content_type = response.headers.get("content-type", "")

    if "text/html" not in content_type.lower():
        return response

    try:
        body = await _claire_a10_read_response_body(response)
        html = body.decode("utf-8", errors="ignore")
        updated = _claire_a10_inject_html_beacon(html)
        headers = dict(response.headers)
        headers.pop("content-length", None)
        return _ClaireA10HTMLResponse(
            content=updated,
            status_code=response.status_code,
            headers=headers,
            media_type="text/html",
        )
    except Exception:
        return response

def _claire_v19_89_0_project_inventory():
        from pathlib import Path as _Path
        from datetime import datetime as _dt, timezone as _tz
        root = _claire_v19_89_0_project_root()

        watched = [
            {"key": "backend_package", "path": "claire", "purpose": "active backend/runtime application package"},
            {"key": "frontend", "path": "frontend", "purpose": "cockpit and presentation layer"},
            {"key": "cockpit_shell", "path": "frontend/cockpit/shell", "purpose": "local cockpit shell and scripts"},
            {"key": "data", "path": "data", "purpose": "data inputs and durable local stores"},
            {"key": "output", "path": "output", "purpose": "runtime outputs and generated results"},
            {"key": "docs", "path": "docs", "purpose": "documentation and architecture records"},
            {"key": "tests", "path": "tests", "purpose": "test coverage and proof checks"},
            {"key": "exports", "path": "exports", "purpose": "exported run/package artifacts"},
            {"key": "tools", "path": "tools", "purpose": "operator and validation tools"},
            {"key": "backend_target", "path": "backend", "purpose": "desired future backend boundary target; optional/not migrated yet"},
            {"key": "archive", "path": "archive", "purpose": "archived/quarantined legacy material"},
        ]

        items = []
        totals = {"files": 0, "directories": 0, "bytes": 0, "existing_surfaces": 0, "missing_surfaces": 0}

        for spec in watched:
            p = root / spec["path"]
            stats = _claire_v19_89_0_count_tree(p)
            if stats["exists"]:
                totals["existing_surfaces"] += 1
            else:
                totals["missing_surfaces"] += 1
            totals["files"] += stats.get("files", 0)
            totals["directories"] += stats.get("directories", 0)
            totals["bytes"] += stats.get("bytes", 0)
            items.append({
                "key": spec["key"],
                "path": spec["path"],
                "purpose": spec["purpose"],
                **stats,
            })

        important_files = []
        for rel in ["main.py", "version.json", "pyproject.toml", "requirements.txt", "pytest.ini"]:
            p = root / rel
            important_files.append({
                "path": rel,
                "exists": p.exists(),
                "bytes": p.stat().st_size if p.exists() and p.is_file() else 0,
                "type": "file" if p.is_file() else "missing",
            })

        readiness = "connected"
        if totals["existing_surfaces"] < 5:
            readiness = "partial"
        if not (root / "frontend" / "cockpit" / "shell" / "cockpit_shell.html").exists():
            readiness = "blocked"

        return {
            "version": "v19.89.0",
            "status": readiness,
            "project_root": str(root),
            "backend_owns_truth": True,
            "cockpit_presentation_only": True,
            "inventory": items,
            "important_files": important_files,
            "totals": totals,
            "timestamp_utc": _dt.now(_tz.utc).isoformat(),
        }

def _claire_v19_89_1_build_surface_map(app):
        routes = _claire_v19_89_1_route_inventory(app)
        live_paths = [r["path"] for r in routes]
        surfaces = []

        for key, spec in _CLAIRE_V19_89_1_OPERATOR_SURFACES.items():
            expected = spec["expected"]
            present = [p for p in expected if _claire_v19_89_1_has_path(live_paths, p)]
            missing = [p for p in expected if not _claire_v19_89_1_has_path(live_paths, p)]
            required_any = spec["required_any"]
            required_present = [p for p in required_any if _claire_v19_89_1_has_path(live_paths, p)]

            if len(present) == len(expected):
                status = "complete"
            elif required_present:
                status = "partial"
            else:
                status = "missing"

            surfaces.append({
                "key": key,
                "label": spec["label"],
                "status": status,
                "purpose": spec["purpose"],
                "expected_routes": expected,
                "present_routes": present,
                "missing_routes": missing,
                "required_any": required_any,
                "required_present": required_present,
                "coverage": round(len(present) / len(expected), 3) if expected else 0,
            })

        summary = {
            "total_surfaces": len(surfaces),
            "complete": len([s for s in surfaces if s["status"] == "complete"]),
            "partial": len([s for s in surfaces if s["status"] == "partial"]),
            "missing": len([s for s in surfaces if s["status"] == "missing"]),
            "live_route_count": len(routes),
        }

        return {
            "version": "v19.89.1",
            "status": "mapped",
            "backend_owns_truth": True,
            "cockpit_presentation_only": True,
            "summary": summary,
            "surfaces": surfaces,
            "routes": routes,
        }

def load_latest_run() -> Dict[str, Any]:
    run_id = latest_run_id()
    if not run_id:
        return {
            "status": "no_active_run",
            "active_run_id": None,
            "runtime": None,
            "lifecycle": None,
            "gates": None,
            "missing_evidence": None,
            "enrichment": None,
            "artifacts": {},
        }

    path = RUNS_DIR / run_id
    manifest = read_json(path / "run_manifest.json", {})
    status = read_json(path / "status.json", {})
    lifecycle = read_json(path / "lifecycle_state.json", {})
    gates = read_json(path / "gate_decisions.json", {})
    missing = read_json(path / "missing_evidence.json", {})
    enrichment = read_json(path / "enrichment_log.json", {})

    return {
        "status": "active_run_loaded",
        "active_run_id": run_id,
        "run_id": run_id,
        "terminal_state": status.get("terminal_state", "runtime_initialized"),
        "selected_route": status.get("selected_route", "pending_evidence"),
        "route": status.get("route", "discovery_first"),
        "runtime": status,
        "run": manifest,
        "lifecycle": lifecycle,
        "gates": gates,
        "missing_evidence": missing,
        "enrichment": enrichment,
        "artifacts": manifest.get("artifact_paths", {}),
    }

        "moat_differentiation",
        "business_model_value_capture",
        "competitor_analysis",
        "portfolio_creation_optimization",
        "acquirer_identification",
        "acquisition_fit_rationale",
        "final_package_construction",
    ]

    stages = []
    stage_source = None

    if isinstance(core_payload, dict):
        raw = core_payload.get("stages") or core_payload.get("stage_results") or core_payload.get("lifecycle_stages")
        if isinstance(raw, list):
            stage_source = "core_payload_list"
            for index, item in enumerate(raw, start=1):
                if isinstance(item, dict):
                    stages.append(
                        {
                            "index": item.get("index", index),
                            "name": item.get("name") or item.get("stage") or f"stage_{index}",
                            "status": item.get("status", "unknown"),
                            "route_status": item.get("route_status") or item.get("route"),
                            "summary": item.get("summary") or item.get("result") or {},
                        }
                    )
        elif isinstance(raw, dict):
            stage_source = "core_payload_dict"
            for index, (name, item) in enumerate(raw.items(), start=1):
                item_dict = item if isinstance(item, dict) else {"value": item}
                stages.append(
                    {
                        "index": index,
                        "name": str(name),
                        "status": item_dict.get("status", "unknown"),
                        "route_status": item_dict.get("route_status") or item_dict.get("route"),
                        "summary": item_dict.get("summary") or item_dict.get("result") or {},
                    }
                )

    if not stages:
        stage_source = "canonical_30_stage_placeholder"
        stages = [
            {
                "index": index,
                "name": name,
                "status": "waiting_for_runtime_output",
                "route_status": "not_loaded",
                "summary": {},
            }
            for index, name in enumerate(stage_names, start=1)
        ]

    completed = sum(1 for item in stages if str(item.get("status")).lower() in {"complete", "completed", "ready", "done"})
    blocked = sum(1 for item in stages if "block" in str(item.get("status")).lower() or "fail" in str(item.get("status")).lower())

    return {
        "stage_source": stage_source,
        "stage_count": len(stages),
        "completed_count": completed,
        "blocked_count": blocked,
        "stages": stages,
    }

def build_canonical_dashboard_payload(project_root: str | Path | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
    root = Path(project_root) if project_root is not None else Path.cwd()

    loaded_payloads: dict[str, Any] = {}
    source_attempts: dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]] = {}

    for key, candidates in CRITICAL_PAYLOAD_FILES.items():
        payload, attempts = first_loaded(root, candidates)
        loaded_payloads[key] = payload
        source_attempts[key] = attempts

    core = loaded_payloads.get("core_run_output")
    route = loaded_payloads.get("route_audit")
    autodesign = loaded_payloads.get("autodesign")
    design_portal = loaded_payloads.get("design_portal")
    validation = loaded_payloads.get("validation")
    web_probe = loaded_payloads.get("web_probe")
    web_evidence = loaded_payloads.get("web_evidence")
    queue = loaded_payloads.get("governed_web_queue")
    dashboard_state = loaded_payloads.get("operator_dashboard_state")

    runtime_status = compact_status(core)
    runtime_status["payload"] = core if isinstance(core, dict) else {}

    route_status = compact_status(route)
    route_status["payload"] = route if isinstance(route, dict) else {}

    design_status = {
        "status": "available" if isinstance(autodesign, dict) or isinstance(design_portal, dict) else "missing",
        "autodesign": compact_status(autodesign),
        "design_portal": compact_status(design_portal),
        "validation": compact_status(validation),
    }

    web_status = {
        "status": "available" if isinstance(web_probe, dict) or isinstance(web_evidence, dict) else "not_connected_or_missing",
        "live_web_execution_enabled": False,
        "automatic_updates_enabled": False,
        "autonomous_agent_execution_enabled": False,
        "runtime_truth_mutation_enabled": False,
        "probe": compact_status(web_probe),
        "evidence": compact_status(web_evidence),
    }

    operator_status = {
        "status": "available" if isinstance(queue, dict) or isinstance(dashboard_state, dict) else "missing",
        "dashboard_state": compact_status(dashboard_state),
        "governed_web_queue": compact_status(queue),
        "operator_actions": [
            {"id": "review", "enabled": True, "execution": "review_only"},
            {"id": "approve", "enabled": False, "execution": "disabled_until_review_contract"},
            {"id": "execute", "enabled": False, "execution": "disabled"},
            {"id": "mutate_runtime_truth", "enabled": False, "execution": "disabled"},
            {"id": "automatic_update", "enabled": False, "execution": "disabled"},
        ],
    }

    portfolio_payload = {}
    breakthrough_payload = {}
    if isinstance(core, dict):
        portfolio_payload = core.get("portfolio") if isinstance(core.get("portfolio"), dict) else {}
        breakthrough_payload = core.get("breakthrough") if isinstance(core.get("breakthrough"), dict) else {}

    sections = {
        "runtime": runtime_status,
        "stage_runtime": build_stage_runtime(core),
        "route_decision": route_status,
        "portfolio": {"status": "available" if portfolio_payload else "missing_or_not_route_selected", "payload": portfolio_payload},
        "breakthrough": {"status": "available" if breakthrough_payload else "missing_or_not_route_selected", "payload": breakthrough_payload},
        "design": design_status,
        "web": web_status,
        "operator_review": operator_status,
        "system_health": {"status": "available", "backend_bootproof_required": True, "dashboard_contract_version": VERSION, "source_attempts": source_attempts},
    }

    panels = build_panels(sections)

    return {
        "version": VERSION,
        "generated_at": utc_now(),
        "contract": "canonical_dashboard_payload",
        "read_only": True,
        "dashboard_ready": True,
        "live_web_execution_enabled": False,
        "automatic_updates_enabled": False,
        "autonomous_agent_execution_enabled": False,
        "runtime_truth_mutation_enabled": False,
        "summary": {
            "runtime_status": sections["runtime"]["status"],
            "stage_count": sections["stage_runtime"]["stage_count"],
            "route_status": sections["route_decision"]["status"],
            "web_status": sections["web"]["status"],
            "operator_review_status": sections["operator_review"]["status"],
            "panel_count": len(panels),
        },
        "panels": panels,
        "sections": sections,
    }

def compose_governed_payload(payload: Dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    composed = _base_payload(payload)
    diagnostics = []

    for module_name, function_name, expected_key in ATTACHMENT_CHAIN:
        try:
            module = importlib.import_module(module_name)
            attach: Callable[[Dict[str, Any]], Dict[str, Any]] | None = getattr(module, function_name, None)
            if attach is None:
                diagnostics.append({"module": module_name, "function": function_name, "status": "missing_function"})
                continue
            before_keys = set(composed.keys())
            composed = attach(composed)
            diagnostics.append({
                "module": module_name,
                "function": function_name,
                "expected_key": expected_key,
                "status": "attached" if expected_key in composed else "attached_missing_expected_key",
                "added_keys": sorted(set(composed.keys()) - before_keys),
            })
        except Exception as exc:
            diagnostics.append({
                "module": module_name,
                "function": function_name,
                "expected_key": expected_key,
                "status": "failed",
                "error": repr(exc),
            })

    composed["governed_payload_reconciliation"] = {
        "version": RECONCILIATION_VERSION,
        "status": "active",
        "authority": {
            "backend_owns_truth": True,
            "cockpit_presentation_only": True,
            "runtime_authority": "blocked",
            "browser_execution_authority": "blocked",
            "operator_mutation_enabled": False,
            "runtime_mutation_enabled": False,
            "workspace_mutation_enabled": False,
            "topology_mutation_enabled": False,
            "fail_closed_governance": True,
            "autonomous_execution_expansion": False,
        },
        "summary": {
            "attachment_total": len(ATTACHMENT_CHAIN),
            "attached_total": sum(1 for item in diagnostics if item["status"] == "attached"),
            "failed_total": sum(1 for item in diagnostics if item["status"] == "failed"),
            "payload_key_total": len(composed.keys()),
        },
        "diagnostics": diagnostics,
    }
    return composed
